file_selection.formats_hint: Supports PDF files — single or multiple selection

dropzone.browse_hint: or click anywhere to browse files…

optimize.title: Optimize PDF
optimize.description: Intelligently reduce file size while preserving document quality and structure.

combine.title: Combine PDFs
combine.description: Seamlessly merge multiple documents into a single professional PDF file.

number.title: Numbering
number.description: Add a correlative red number to the top-right corner of the first page of each PDF.

metadata.title: Remove Metadata
metadata.description: Protect your privacy by removing author, date, software, and XMP metadata from your PDFs.

unlock.title: Manage Permissions
unlock.description: Remove passwords if you know them and restore permissions like printing, copying, or modifying content.

merge_screen.title: Combine PDFs
merge_screen.subtitle: Files will be merged in the order shown below.

simple_tool.numbering_subtitle: A correlative number will be assigned to each file, starting from:
simple_tool.metadata_subtitle: All metadata (author, dates, software, XMP) will be removed from the selected files.
simple_tool.unlock_subtitle: Enter the password if the PDF is encrypted. PDFs with permission-only restrictions will be processed automatically without a password.
simple_tool.no_encrypted_files: None of the selected files have a password. Nothing to process.
simple_tool.no_processable_files: All files are encrypted. Nothing to process.

unlock_screen.title: Permissions & Password Management
unlock_screen.subtitle: Modify access, printing, editing permissions and more. You can also set or remove passwords.
unlock_screen.perm_print_desc: Allows printing the document in low resolution.
unlock_screen.perm_print_hq_desc: Allows printing the document in high resolution / maximum quality. Note: enabling this permission also automatically enables normal print permission.
unlock_screen.perm_modify_desc: Allows editing document content (text, images, etc.).
unlock_screen.perm_extract_desc: Allows copying or extracting text and images from the document.
unlock_screen.perm_annotate_desc: Allows adding comments, highlights, and annotations to the document.
unlock_screen.perm_forms_desc: Allows filling in interactive form fields in the document.
unlock_screen.perm_access_desc: Allows extracting content for accessibility tools (screen readers).
unlock_screen.perm_assembly_desc: Allows inserting, rotating, or deleting pages in the document.
unlock_screen.password_tooltip: Set user password for the output PDF
unlock_screen.new_password_desc: Optionally set passwords to protect the output files. Leave empty to apply no password.

lossless.label: Lossless
lossless.desc: Reorganises internal PDF structures (object streams, compression) without touching images or fonts. The output is visually identical to the original.

moderate.label: Moderate
moderate.desc: Recompresses images to 150 DPI / quality 80 and enables font subsetting via Ghostscript. Good balance between size and quality; most effective on image-heavy PDFs.

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.desc: Recompresses images to 96 DPI / quality 50, performs a full Ghostscript rewrite, and removes metadata. Best results on PDFs with many large images; may noticeably reduce image sharpness.

custom.label: Custom
custom.desc: Choose your own DPI, quality, Ghostscript, and cleanup settings. Use this when the presets don't fit your needs.

strategy.apply_all_tooltip: Set the same strategy for every file
strategy.nothing_to_optimize_msg: All files are set to Skip. Select a strategy for at least one file.
strategy.info_alert: The strategy with the highest compression has been auto-selected for each file. Review the selection — Lossless is often the best choice since it preserves full quality with no visual changes. Use the eye icon to preview the result before deciding.
strategy.custom_tooltip:
To use customizable settings, select 'Custom' from the "Apply to all..." dropdown
or click the individual file column in the table underneath.
strategy.gs_required_tooltip: This strategy requires Ghostscript. Install it to unlock this option.
strategy.gs_not_available_warning: Ghostscript is not installed. Moderate and Aggressive strategies are unavailable. Install Ghostscript to unlock all compression options.

custom_panel.title: CUSTOM STRATEGY SETTINGS
custom_panel.compress_images_tooltip: Enable advanced image compression to reduce file size.
custom_panel.target_dpi_tooltip: Target image resolution. Lower values create significantly smaller files but reduce image clarity.
custom_panel.jpeg_quality_tooltip: Image compression strength. Lower values save more space but can introduce visual artifacts.
custom_panel.ghostscript_tooltip: Use Ghostscript engine for deep PDF structural optimization.
custom_panel.subset_fonts_tooltip: Remove unused characters from embedded fonts. Can drastically reduce size if many fonts are used.
custom_panel.clean_rewrites_tooltip: Rewrite perfectly formatted structures. Removes unknown objects but can break complex forms.
custom_panel.metadata_tooltip: Strip redundant document properties, author info, and XMP metadata.
custom_panel.forms_tooltip: Convert interactive form fields into static text, making them non-editable but lighter.
custom_panel.js_scripts_tooltip: Remove embedded JavaScript and macros for improved safety and slightly smaller size.
custom_panel.estimate_tooltip: Run a quick simulation to estimate final file size with these settings.

results.title: Optimisation Complete!
results.summary_ok: Saved {size} overall ({pct}% average reduction). {ok}/{total} files optimised successfully.

welcome.title: Welcome to SafeTool PDF!
welcome.description: Optimize your PDF files securely and privately. All processing is done locally on your computer.
welcome.workflow_description: Follow these 4 simple steps to optimize your PDFs:

1.title: Select your files
1.description: Drag & drop or select one or more PDF files.

2.title: Automatic analysis
2.description: The PDF structure is analyzed: images, fonts, forms, etc.

3.title: Choose a strategy
3.description: Compare presets (Lossless, Balanced, Maximum) and pick your preference.

4.title: Get results
4.description: The optimized file is saved alongside the original with the _safetoolhub suffix.

privacy.title: Total privacy
privacy.description: Your files never leave your computer. No uploads, no tracking.

presets.title: Smart presets
presets.description: 3 ready-to-use strategies, plus a custom option.

ghostscript.title: Ghostscript
ghostscript.description: Install Ghostscript to unlock maximum compression with font subsetting.

system_tools.title: System tools
system_tools.info: Ghostscript is optional but significantly improves compression results.
system_tools.gs_not_installed: ✗ Ghostscript not found — Balanced and Maximum strategies will be limited
system_tools.install_instructions:
Linux: sudo apt install ghostscript
macOS: brew install ghostscript
Windows: Download from ghostscript.com

optimizer.title: PDF Optimizer
optimizer.description: Reduce the size of your PDFs with lossless compression or advanced options.

merge.title: Merge PDFs
merge.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document.

numberer.title: Page Numberer
numberer.description: Add page numbering to your PDF documents.

split.title: Split PDF
split.description: Separate a PDF into multiple individual files.

dev.trust_footer: ✓ Your files never leave your computer

settings.theme_note: Note: SafeTool PDF uses a light Material Design theme by default. Changes take effect on restart.
settings.output_desc: Define the default suffix for modified files.
settings.suffix_note: This suffix will be added by default to modified files, but can be changed later.
settings.gs_note: Ghostscript enables font subsetting and deep PDF rewrite. It is optional but highly recommended.
settings.language_note: Changing the language requires an application restart.
settings.debugging_desc: Tools for diagnosis and bug fixing.
settings.enable_logging: Save log files to facilitate error debugging

details.title: Title
details.author: Author
details.subject: Subject
details.creator: Creator
details.owner_access_note: You have owner access — all permissions are available regardless of stored restrictions

cli.description: {app_name} {version} — Optimize PDF files from the command line.
cli.arg_files: One or more PDF files to optimize.
cli.custom_group_desc: Use --custom to enable custom optimization parameters.
cli.no_valid_files: No valid PDF files to process.

optimizer.signatures_warning: This PDF contains digital signatures. Destructive optimizations would invalidate the signatures. Use 'Preserve' mode or remove the signatures first.
optimizer.already_optimized: This PDF appears to be already well-optimized. Reduction potential is estimated at <5%.
optimizer.gs_not_available: Ghostscript not available — font subsetting and full rewrite will be skipped.
optimizer.pdfa_warning: This PDF claims PDF/A-{level} conformance. Some optimizations may break PDF/A compliance.

verifier.file_larger: Optimized file is {pct}% larger than the original ({optimized} > {original} bytes).

analyzer.encrypted_incomplete: PDF is encrypted; some analysis may be incomplete.
analyzer.encrypted_pikepdf: PDF is encrypted — pikepdf could not open it.

lossy_images.unsupported: PyMuPDF version does not support rewrite_images(); lossy image optimization skipped.

lossy_gs.no_output: Ghostscript produced no output or an empty file.
lossy_gs.not_found: Ghostscript binary not found. Font subsetting and full rewrite require Ghostscript to be installed or bundled.

gs_detect.bundled_old: Bundled GS found but version too old: {path}
gs_detect.system_old: System GS found but version too old: {path}
